key_themes: Record Q1 2026 earnings with 47% revenue growth and strong EPS beat
Jim Cramer endorsement as a 'hidden gem,' 'real compounder,' and one of the best under-the-radar businesses
Ongoing business expansion via acquisitions (e.g. WCSI banknotes), partnerships (Pathfinder for cross-border payments), and new Securitization Banking platform
Analyst upgrades, Strong Buy ratings, raised price targets (to $113), and growth investor appeal
Strong price momentum with multiple new 52-week highs, up ~10% in a week and ~98% over the past year
summary: Sentiment around StoneX Group Inc. (SNEX) is strongly positive in mid-April 2026. The company delivered record Q1 2026 results with sharply higher revenues, net income, and ROE, fueled by acquisitions and strength across institutional, commercial, and metals businesses.[[1]](https://simplywall.st/stocks/us/diversified-financials/nasdaq-snex/stonex-group/news/why-stonex-group-snex-is-up-85-after-record-q1-2026-earnings)[[2]](http://ir.stonex.com/news-releases/news-release-details/stonex-group-inc-reports-fiscal-2026-first-quarter-financial) Jim Cramer has repeatedly highlighted the stock as an under-the-radar compounder with elite execution in payments, FX, clearing, and brokerage, while Zacks and other outlets have issued bullish notes on growth potential and upgrades to Strong Buy.[[3]](https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/SNEX/)[[4]](https://www.cnbc.com/quotes/SNEX)
sources: 15+ recent news articles (Yahoo Finance, Zacks, Seeking Alpha, company IR), 20+ X posts (Latest mode keyword and semantic searches highlighting highs, Cramer, insider activity, and breakouts), Company press releases on Q1 results and strategic initiatives
